summary: This document outlines a pilot proposal for an AI-driven patient intake system designed for UK GP practices. It details the background challenges, pilot objectives, success metrics, and expected financial savings for the NHS. The text includes implementation plans and risk mitigation strategies, though some sections appear to be outlines.
